title: Nbutler
compiled_truth: Nbutler is an external contact at [Susmangodfrey](companies/susmangodfrey). Over the corpus period (2000-11-02 to 2001-05-07), Nbutler sent 13 and received 18 emails, totalling 31 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dan J Hyvl](people/dan-j-hyvl) (13).
timeline:
